name: @longfeng/root
description: Repository root · husky pre-commit hooks for cross-stack lint

scripts.lint:mp: cd frontend/apps/mp && pnpm lint && pnpm test:unit
scripts.lint:h5: cd frontend/apps/h5 && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && mvn -q checkstyle:check spotbugs:check -DskipTests || true
